notes: deterministic_functional_pass_rate is enforced by scripts/rfp_lint_selftest.py (15 cases) plus the starter example_lint and skeleton expected-fail; this is the release gate for a knowledge+linter skill.

max_time_increase_seconds / max_token_increase were retired in 2026.6.16: they assumed a paired LLM latency benchmark that was never instrumented for this artifact type (see references/readiness_report.md).
